description_long: This bungalow features a broad, double-gabled roof with deep overhangs and a central open atrium, allowing natural light to flood the interior. The structure is elevated on a platform with wide steps leading up to the main entrance, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone. Large, open window spaces line the sides, providing ample ventilation and a sense of openness. The roof is clad in dark brown tiles, contrasting with the lighter walls and structural supports. The central section of the bungalow is open, possibly serving as a communal or living area, flanked by two enclosed wings. The overall design is symmetrical, with a strong emphasis on horizontal lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A symmetrical bungalow with a double-gabled, dark-tiled roof, open central atrium, and wide steps leading to a raised platform. Large window openings and light-colored walls create an airy, open feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide steps, central entrance, and symmetrical double-gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open central atrium, large window spaces, and the depth of the roof overhangs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with steps and a similar gabled roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the open atrium and symmetrical layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical open window spaces along both sides
